description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that runs on every push to any branch. The workflow has two jobs: Build and Coverage. The Build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-latest OS, with g++ and clang++ compilers, and Debug and Release build types. It checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures CMake, builds, and tests. The Coverage job runs on ubuntu-latest, only on the master branch, and performs similar steps but with a focus on code coverage, uploading the results to Codecov.
